scripts.install:all: npm install --workspaces=false --ignore-scripts && corepack pnpm --dir RagFrontend install --no-frozen-lockfile && corepack pnpm --dir RagMobile install --no-frozen-lockfile && python tools/poetryw.py --directory RagBackend install --with dev
scripts.backend:lint: python tools/poetryw.py --directory RagBackend run ruff check trace_logging.py audit exception tests/test_tooling_smoke.py && python tools/poetryw.py --directory RagBackend run black --check trace_logging.py audit exception tests/test_tooling_smoke.py && python tools/poetryw.py --directory RagBackend run mypy trace_logging.py audit exception tests/test_tooling_smoke.py
scripts.backend:test: python tools/poetryw.py --directory RagBackend run pytest tests/test_tooling_smoke.py
scripts.backend:coverage: corepack pnpm run backend:coverage:stable && corepack pnpm run backend:coverage:core
scripts.backend:coverage:stable: python tools/poetryw.py --directory RagBackend run pytest tests/test_tooling_smoke.py tests/test_trace_logging_unit.py tests/test_trace_middleware.py tests/test_exceptions_unit.py tests/test_audit_log_unit.py tests/test_audit_log_routes.py --cov-reset --cov --cov-config=.coveragerc.stable --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90
scripts.backend:coverage:core: python tools/poetryw.py --directory RagBackend run pytest tests/test_retrieval_strategy.py tests/test_reranker.py tests/test_model_router.py tests/test_rag_app_routes.py --cov-reset --cov --cov-config=.coveragerc.core --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=60
scripts.quality:check: corepack pnpm run frontend:lint && corepack pnpm run frontend:typecheck && corepack pnpm run frontend:coverage && corepack pnpm run mobile:lint && corepack pnpm run dupcheck && corepack pnpm run backend:lint && corepack pnpm run backend:coverage
scripts.apifox:export: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const out='apifox/collections/KnowledgeRAG_API.json'; const url=process.env.OPENAPI_URL||'http://localhost:8000/openapi.json'; fetch(url).then(async (res)=>{ if(!res.ok) throw new Error('OpenAPI export failed: '+res.status); const json=await res.json(); fs.mkdirSync('apifox/collections',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(out, JSON.stringify(json, null, 2)); console.log('Exported OpenAPI to '+out); }).catch((err)=>{ console.error(err.message||err); process.exit(1); });"
